page.title: Category:Ancient burial mounds in East Asia

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「東アジアの古墳 {{デフォルトソート:こふん ひかしあしあ}} [[Category:古墳]]」
体裁を調整。

==Japanese Content== [[東アジア]]の[[古墳]]に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:こふん ひかしあしあ}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:東アジアの古墳]]|version=71455438}} [[ja:Category:東アジアの古墳]]

{{デフォルトソート:こふん ひかしあしあ}}
{{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:東アジアの古墳]]}}
==Old Content== (2025-05-15T21:36:57Z): (Bot: update category metadata)
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:Kofun]].
(2025-05-15T06:09:48Z): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:Kofun]].
{{translated page|ja|Category:東アジアの古墳|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}}
[[ja:Category:東アジアの古墳]] [[Category:Archaeological sites in Asia]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Cemeteries in Asia]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Kofun (general concept)]] [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]]
[[Category:Original categories]]
[[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]

Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q65646740)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
